name: NY vs California AI legal evidence rules different?

mainEntity.name: NY vs California AI legal evidence rules different?

acceptedAnswer.text: Very similar—AI not privileged either place.[1][4]
acceptedAnswer.description:
Similar; both follow *Heppner* privilege denial, state bars AI guidance.[1][4] Fed rules apply.

**Key factors:**
- No priv self-AI.
- CA/NY supervision duty.
- Discovery broad.

Nat'l consistency; local bar check. Lawyer per state.[4] Uniform risk.
